> Maintained by Arkash Jain — https://www.arkashj.com — arkash@benmore.tech

# Arkash Jain — AI Researcher, Forward Deployed Engineer & Builder

## Bio

Arkash Jain is an AI researcher and forward deployed engineer based at Benmore Technologies. He recently completed ML research at Harvard Medical School (Kirchhausen Lab), where he authored SpatialDINO — the first 3D self-supervised vision transformer for cryo-electron tomography. Before that, he did distributed systems research at Boston University (BA/MS in Math & CS, 2024), worked in venture capital at Battery Ventures, and conducted undergraduate research in ultrafast spectroscopy.

Current role: Head of Forward Deployed Engineering at Benmore, building Cattle Logic (operating system for American cattle ranches) and the Benmore Foundry CLI for repeatable AI consulting engagements.

Expertise: self-supervised learning, vision transformers, distributed systems (Apache Flink, Raft, RocksDB), supercritical fluid spectroscopy, venture capital, building AI-first software.

## Publications

1. **SpatialDINO: Self-Supervised Learning for 3D Vision Transformers** (2025)
   - BioRxiv: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.02.04.636474
   - Authors: Arkash Jain et al. (Kirchhausen Lab, Harvard Medical School)
   - First-author work. 3D self-supervised vision transformer for cryo-ET subcellular structure prediction.

2. **Close-up of Vesicular ER Exit Sites by Volume Electron Imaging using FIB-SEM** (2026)
   - Journal of Cell Biology, 225(1): e202504178
   - Authors: Kirchhausen Lab
   - URL: https://rupress.org/jcb/article-abstract/225/1/e202504178/278432/

3. **Close-up of Vesicular ER Exit Sites by FIB-SEM (preprint)** (Apr 2025)
   - BioRxiv: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.04.23.650353v3
   - Pre-print companion with full FIB-SEM volumes and segmentation pipeline.

4. **Ultrafast 2DIR comparison of rotational energy transfer, isolated binary collision breakdown, and near critical fluctuations in Xe and SF6 solutions** (Nov 2022)
   - Journal of Chemical Physics, 157(17): 174305
   - Authors: Arkash Jain et al.
   - First-author work on supercritical-fluid dynamics using ultrafast 2DIR spectroscopy.
   - URL: https://pubs.aip.org/aip/jcp/article-abstract/157/17/174305/2842177/

## Major Projects

- **Cattle Logic** (2026) — Operating system for American cattle ranches. Offline-first, CME-integrated. Built at Benmore.
- **SpatialDINO** (2025) — 3D self-supervised vision transformer for cryo-ET. BioRxiv preprint, Harvard Medical School.
- **Benmore Foundry CLI** (2025) — Internal orchestration layer for SMB AI consulting engagements.
- **Raft (Go)** (2023) — From-scratch consensus implementation with leader election, log replication, snapshotting.
- **Dynamic Checkpointing in Apache Flink** (2024) — BU thesis: adaptive checkpoint cadence driven by backpressure.

## Timeline Highlights

- **2019**: JEE Advanced rank ~8,000 (top 1% of ~1M candidates across India)
- **2020**: Arrived in Boston from Chandigarh, India. Started at Boston University.
- **2021**: NSF UROP Scholar (1 of 5 freshmen selected university-wide). First paper in chemical physics.
- **2022**: Battery Ventures intern (sourcing and diligence). First-author paper published (J. Chem. Phys.).
- **2024**: BA/MS Boston University (Magna Cum Laude). Started at Harvard Kirchhausen Lab.
- **2025**: SpatialDINO BioRxiv preprint. Joined Benmore Technologies as Employee #2. 887% revenue growth.
- **2026**: Cattle Logic launched. Head of Forward Deployed Engineering at Benmore.

## Education

- **Boston University**: BA in Math & CS, MS in Computer Science (2024) — Magna Cum Laude
  - TA across systems and theory courses
  - Thesis: Dynamic checkpointing for Apache Flink
  - Marvin Freedman Scholar (top math award)
- **Harvard Medical School**: Kirchhausen Lab, ML Researcher (May 2024 – Aug 2025)
- **High School**: Prepared for JEE Advanced physics, chemistry, and mathematics. Took AP Calculus, AP Physics C: Mechanics, AP Physics C: E&M.

## Knowledge Domains

Arkash maintains a public knowledge base organized by domain:
- **AI**: Self-supervised learning, vision transformers, distributed training infrastructure
- **Finance**: Aggregation theory, AI infrastructure economics, venture capital
- **Distributed Systems**: Flink, RocksDB, Raft, MapReduce, checkpointing
- **Math**: Optimizers, convergence, intuition behind proofs
- **Physics**: Supercritical fluids, ultrafast spectroscopy, nuclear reactor efficiency
- **Software**: Stack evolution, Claude Code, production tooling

## Open Source — Claude Code Skills

Arkash maintains a public library of 71 Claude Code skills for forward-deployed engineering.

- Public skills index: https://www.arkashj.com/skills
- Each skill has a `/raw` endpoint exposing its full SKILL.md as plain text:
  https://www.arkashj.com/skills/<slug>/raw
- Source repo: https://github.com/Benmore-Studio/Benmore-Meridian
- Categories: Payments, Compliance, Design Engineering, AI SEO, CLI, Frontend, Tooling, Workflow & Ops

## Recent Activity

Arkash maintains a weekly running log at https://www.arkashj.com/weekly with one entry per ISO week covering what he read, watched, built, shipped, learned, and who he met.

Latest weekly logs:
- 2026-W18 (2026-04-27 → 2026-05-03): Cattle Logic onboarding + Skills go public — https://www.arkashj.com/weekly/2026-W18

## Site Map

Home (/) — Introduction, featured papers, current work, latest writing
Skills (/skills) — Public library of 71 Claude Code skills, copy-ready for LLMs
About (/about) — Full life changelog with milestones and education
Research (/research) — All 4 published papers with abstracts and links
Projects (/projects) — Featured work: Cattle Logic, SpatialDINO, open source
Writing (/writing) — Essays on AI, finance, distributed systems, forward-deployed engineering
Weekly (/weekly) — Running log: read/watched/built/shipped/learned per ISO week
Experience (/experience) — Career history and work tools/CLIs
Stack (/stack) — Current tools, frameworks, hardware, services
Learnings (/learnings) — Lessons learned the hard way
Knowledge (/knowledge) — Deep-dive articles by domain (AI, Finance, Math, Physics, Distributed Systems, Software)
Docs (/docs) — Project documentation, handoff, and changelog
